caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with the gold text "BOSSES TALK" is seated at a desk in a recording studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. To his right sits a black mug featuring the red and white text "BOSSES TALK OUT LOUD". Behind him is a white wall adorned with several gold star logos and the text "UNICO HUSTLE", as well as a blue sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, shifting his facial expression from a slight smile to a wider grin as he looks toward someone off-camera to his right. He gestures slightly with his hands on the desk, while the background and equipment remain static.
